BEER + WINE + COCKTAIL
We’ve taken every effort to create an enjoyable dining environment and continue to be conscious of social distancing as we return to regular beverage and dining service. If you have specific needs, please let our team know.
At Bold Monk, we offer a variety of experiences, including a bookstore with curated selections for purchase in our upstairs Abbey, Bold Monk retail gifts located at our host area, and a beer garden located across the bridge from the Abbey upstairs.
Thanks for joining us!
